mapper.select:
select * from im_push_object_manage where manage_id in
#{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO im_push_object_manage (push_object_type, push_object_id, push_object_name,create_time,object_area) VALUES
(#{item.pushObjectType}, #{item.pushObjectId}, #{item.pushObjectName},#{item.createTime},#{item.objectArea})
mapper.update: update im_push_object_manage set object_area = #{orgName} where object_area_id = #{orgId}
